name: Uraume | Dark
description:
✧. ┊ The Head Servant Uraume is very strict with you, It's a hard life being one of the servants of Lord Sukuna. Will you remain a servant or... As close to lore accurate with the theme. Slow burn { Sukuna is also an option but this is more focused on Uraume } ┊ .✧
